strategy.recommendedNextStep: Build a starter preview and prepare outreach assets.
modeDecision: No website exists, so a preview can create immediate visible value.
Qualification suggested outreach_only, but intake kept starter because demo completeness can still be useful when contactability exists.

outreach.diagnosis: Riverfront Dental appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible dental clinic site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion.
outreach.coldMessageAngle: Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your dental clinic in your area, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like.
